postTitle: Head of Web Dev
descContent:
**Description**  

**Location:** Global / Remote

**Time Zone Expectations:** PST (Pacific Time)

**Employment Type:** Full-Time (Exempt)

**Reporting To:** Head of Website

### **Overview**

We are driving a new era of premium consumer products through innovation,
performance, and unforgettable experiences at home. Built from humble
beginnings into a highly profitable, omnichannel, pre-IPO brand, we are
redefining what customers expect from our category—combining superior product
performance with lifestyle storytelling.

We’ve built a powerhouse team, and we’re looking for a **Web Development
Manager** to lead and elevate our digital ecosystem. This is a hands-on,
technical leadership role for someone who can act as the **go-to technical
authority** , drive best practices, and ensure our web platforms are scalable,
secure, and best-in-class.

If you are passionate about building a consumer brand that goes beyond the
transaction, this is your sign to apply.

### **Role Summary**

As the Web Development Manager, you will serve as the **lead developer and
architect** across our entire web development function. You will lead a team
of developers while remaining highly hands-on—writing code, reviewing
solutions, setting architectural direction, and ensuring exceptional execution
across all digital initiatives.

This role requires deep expertise in **Shopify development** , modern web
frameworks, systems architecture, integrations, and performance/security
optimization. You will partner cross-functionally across eCommerce, Marketing,
Creative, Operations, and IT to translate business goals into scalable
technical solutions.

### **Key Responsibilities**

  * Serve as the **lead developer** , architecting, coding, and reviewing solutions for web platforms (Shopify, custom applications, integrations, internal tools). 
  * Act as the **primary technical resource** for the development team, providing mentorship, troubleshooting support, and engineering best practices. 
  * Own the overall **architecture of the web ecosystem** , ensuring scalability, maintainability, and alignment with business goals. 
  * Manage, coach, and inspire a team of developers—setting clear expectations and ensuring excellence in development workflows. 
  * Establish and enforce best practices for: 
    * Version control (Git) 
    * CI/CD pipelines 
    * Testing and deployment 
    * Environment management 
    * Monitoring, uptime, and reliability 
  *   * Partner with cross-functional stakeholders to scope and deliver high-impact web solutions. 
  * Lead sprint planning, technical estimation/scoping, and code review processes. 
  * Oversee and maintain **site performance, security, and reliability** across all environments. 
  * Ensure technical documentation is created and maintained (architecture, systems, integrations, workflows). 
  * Stay current with modern web technologies and proactively recommend improvements and innovations. 

  
  
**Requirements**  

### **Requirements**

  * **7+ years** of web development experience with mastery of: 
    * Modern web frameworks and CMS platforms (Shopify, WordPress, or similar) 
    * JavaScript libraries/frameworks (React, Vue, etc.) 
    * Backend technologies and systems design 
  *   * **2–3+ years** in a lead or managerial capacity overseeing developers. 
  * Deep Shopify expertise including: 
    * Liquid 
    * Hydrogen 
    * Storefront API 
    * Checkout extensibility 
    * Metafields & Metaobjects 
    * Custom app development 
  *   * Proven ability to remain hands-on while leading architecture decisions and technical roadmaps. 
  * Expert knowledge of: 
    * Responsive design 
    * Cross-browser compatibility 
    * Accessibility standards 
    * Performance optimization 
  *   * Strong experience with APIs, integrations, and database design/management. 
  * Strong ownership of modern dev ops practices including: 
    * CI/CD pipelines 
    * Deployment strategies 
    * Monitoring and environment reliability 
  *   * Experience ensuring compliance with: 
    * PCI 
    * GDPR/CCPA 
    * Security best practices across systems 
  *   * Exceptional problem-solving and troubleshooting skills. 
  * Leadership presence: able to command technical respect while mentoring and elevating others. 
  * Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent professional experience. 
  * Passion for food and cooking is a plus (culinary experience also a bonus).

postTitle: Content Manager for a Marketing/SaaS Blog (10-15 hours/week)
jobTitle: Content Manager for a Marketing/SaaS Blog (10-15 hours/week)
descContent:
We're looking for a part-time Content Manager to help run and grow
[ONSAAS](https://www.onsaas.me/), a SaaS-focused media site publishing
reviews, comparisons, and SEO/GEO-driven content for B2B tools.  
  
This is a hands-on role, around 10-15 hours per week (roughly up to 2-3
hours/day), with flexibility and room to grow if we’re a good fit.  
  
**What you’ll be doing**

  * Creating SEO / GEO-first content briefs: Keywords, search intent, AI visibility angles, structure — the full brief, not just a title.

  * Producing AI-assisted content: We use LLMs heavily, but with a strong human layer. You’ll be involved in briefing, guiding AI outputs, and editing to ensure content is original, useful, and actually ranks.

  * Publishing & reviewing content: Managing articles from content partners and guest contributors, reviewing quality, optimizing for SEO/GEO, and publishing.

  * Owning SEO / GEO performance: Tracking key metrics, spotting opportunities, and proactively suggesting ideas to grow traffic and AI search visibility.

  * Helping with lead gen for sponsored content: Some articles (listicles, reviews, comparisons) are sponsored by SaaS companies. You’ll help maintain an outreach pipeline aligned with our content and keyword strategy.

  * Updating & refreshing existing content: Keeping articles accurate, competitive, and up to date.

  * Light design work: Simple visuals or infographics when needed (Canva is perfectly fine).

  
**What we are looking for**

  * Strong understanding of SEO and interest/experience in GEO / AI search visibility

  * Comfortable working with AI content workflows (prompting, editing, improving outputs)

  * Editorial mindset — you care about clarity, structure, and usefulness, not just keywords

  * Organized, proactive, and comfortable owning a process

  * SaaS / B2B content experience is a big plus  
  

**Practical details**

  * Hourly role, capped at ~10-15 hours/week for now

  * Flexible schedule — works well for students or anyone looking for a side project alongside a main job

  * Long-term potential, with the possibility to grow into a full-time role  
  

**How to apply**

Fill out the application form and answer a few short questions about your
experience and availability. It should only take a few minutes:
<https://forms.gle/3iTL3YQ5rTtnbZho7>

**  
Next steps**

  * Short test task

  * If successful, interview with the ONSAAS team

If you’re the right fit to proceed, we’ll contact you via email within two
weeks of applying. Please keep an eye on your inbox.

descContent:
本人独立音乐人，现有 55 首高品质原创音乐作品（包含人声版、伴奏版、合写版）需要进行国内版权库的系统分发（主攻 VFine、猴子音乐等）。

**【我们需要你做什么】**

1.  **资产整理**：按照我提供的表格，核对文件名、音轨完整度。
    
2.  **版权上传**：负责国内平台的上传、标签提取、风格分类及文案填报（我会提供 AI 辅助工具，你只需校对和点击）。
    
3.  **进度追踪**：确保每一首歌都通过审核，并记录状态。
    

**【我们希望你是这样的人】**

*   **强迫症倾向**：对文件重命名、分类有极度的秩序感。
    
*   **懂点音乐**：能分清 Genre、BPM，听得懂人声版和伴奏版的区别。
    
*   **沟通高效**：不玩失踪，遇到问题（如审核未通过）能及时沟通解决。
    
*   **加分项**：有版权库上传经验或音乐相关专业学生。
    

**【报酬】** 按件计费或项目包干。只要你靠谱，价格好商量。长期合作，后续还有更多创作分发。 **有意者请带上你的相关经验私信我。拒绝“闲鱼式”游击队，寻找长期战友。**

postTitle: 【远程】Community Moderator / 技术社区运营负责人（Nervos Talk)
jobTitle: Community Moderator / 技术社区运营负责人
descContent:
### 关于这个角色

我们正在为 [**Nervos Talk**](https://talk.nervos.org/) 招募一位 _Community Moderator_，负责推动一个以技术讨论为核心的社区持续成长。

这是一个偏长期建设的角色。你将通过 **内容、活动和机制设计**，提升社区讨论质量与参与度；同时，在必要时，通过清晰、公正的规则维护社区的长期健康。

如果你对技术社区、开源文化和深度讨论充满兴趣，并愿意把社区当成一个长期“产品”来运营，这个角色会非常适合你。

### 你将负责

*   通过内容策划、话题引导和线上活动，持续提升 Nervos Talk 的活跃度与讨论质量
*   主动发起和参与技术相关讨论，鼓励高质量交流与观点碰撞
*   设计并执行社区活动，如线上分享、AMA、主题讨论、系列内容等
*   与社区成员保持持续互动，理解不同类型用户（新手、核心参与者、长期贡献者）的需求
*   制定并维护清晰的社区规则，为高质量讨论提供稳定、可预期的环境
*   在必要情况下执行社区治理动作（如删帖、禁言等），并向社区清晰解释决策逻辑
*   使用中英文与全球社区成员沟通，促进跨语言、跨文化的讨论与参与
*   持续观察社区参与度与内容结构，并根据实际情况不断优化运营方式

### 我们希望你具备

*   技术社区或开源社区的长期参与经验（论坛、开源项目、技术讨论社区等）
*   对“如何让社区更活跃、更有价值”有自己的理解和实践方法
*   良好的内容策划与书面表达能力，能够输出结构清晰、有观点的社区内容
*   能在保持社区友好氛围的同时，清晰设定讨论边界
*   能理解技术讨论的基本逻辑，并判断讨论质量（不要求具备工程背景）

### 加分项

*   组织或长期运营过技术社区活动、栏目或讨论机制
*   曾担任社区 Moderator、核心志愿者或规则制定者
*   具备中英文双语书面与沟通能力，能够参与专业讨论
*   有跨文化或国际社区协作经验
*   对区块链、开源软件或去中心化系统有长期兴趣

### 工作方式

*   支持远程工作
*   全职 / 合作制可讨论
*   面向全球社区成员，重视长期投入与持续建设

### 关于 Nervos CKB

[**Nervos Network**](https://github.com/nervosnetwork) 是一个专注于长期价值与可持续性的公链项目，核心目标是为去中心化应用提供一个安全、开放且可扩展的基础设施。

其底层公链 **CKB（Common Knowledge Base）** 采用以比特币为灵感的设计理念，强调：

*   安全性与去中心化优先
*   通过 Layer 1 + Layer 2 架构实现可扩展性
*   以 “状态存储即价值” 的模型支持长期生态发展

Nervos 长期投入于开源、研究与工程实践，社区讨论不仅关注“怎么用”，也关注“为什么这样设计”。

Nervos Talk 正是这样一个面向长期技术思考与建设的社区。

### 如何申请

如果你对这个角色感兴趣，欢迎投递简历至下方邮箱（备注来自电鸭）

除简历外，我们非常欢迎你一并提供能够体现你真实社区经验的相关材料或链接，例如：

*   你长期参与过的技术社区平台链接 （如 Reddit、Hacker News、技术论坛、开源社区等）

postTitle: [招聘 / 外包] eBay ERP 系统开发（官方 API， 300 账号，接受个人/小团队）
descContent:
### 项目背景

我们自营约 **300 个 eBay 店铺账号** ，目前使用的方案为：

  * <https://www.datacaciques.com/product/erpEbay>

计划开发一套 **自有 eBay ERP 系统** ，基于 **eBay 官方 API （ OAuth2 ）** 运作，**尽量减少人工登录 eBay
官网操作** 。

本项目目标清晰：  
👉 **先做“可用、稳定、能跑 300 账号”的 MVP ，不追求一次到位。**

* * *

### 功能范围（ MVP 阶段）

#### 1\. Listing 管理

  * 刊登 / 修改 / 下架
  * 支持多账号、多站点

#### 2\. 订单与发货

  * 订单定时拉取
  * 发货信息回传（ tracking number ）

#### 3\. Buyer Message

  * 拉取买家消息
  * 模板回复（半自动即可）

#### 4\. 纠纷（ Case / Dispute ）处理

  * 拉取纠纷列表与状态
  * 查看纠纷详情与历史
  * 基础回复 / 状态更新

#### 5\. 操作员与权限管理

  * 操作员账号管理
  * 基础权限分配（ Listing / 订单 / 消息 / 纠纷 / 管理）
  * 关键操作日志（操作人 / 时间 / eBay 账号 / 行为）

#### 6\. eBay 账号管理

  * 多账号 OAuth 授权（≈300 ）
  * token 自动刷新
  * API 调用频率控制（ rate limit ）

* * *

### 明确不做的功能

  * ❌ 财务 / 对账 / 成本核算 
  * ❌ 广告投放（ Promoted Listings ） 
  * ❌ 复杂进销存 / 仓储系统 
  * ❌ 爬虫、模拟登录 eBay 官网（仅接受官方 API 方案）

* * *

### 技术要求

  * 熟悉 **eBay 官方 API / OAuth2 授权机制**
  * 有 **eBay / Amazon / Shopee / Lazada 等跨境平台接口或 ERP 开发经验** 者优先
  * 能处理：
    * 多账号管理（≈300 ）
    * API 限流
    * token 生命周期
    * 异步 / 队列类任务
  * 后端技术栈不限（ Java / Python / PHP / Node.js 均可）
  * 有真实生产环境项目经验，非练手项目

* * *

### 合作方式与预算

  * 合作方式：
    * ✅ 项目制外包
    * ✅ 能力强的个人 / 小团队
    * 可长期技术合作
  * 预算说明：
    * **MVP 阶段预算：5–10 万 RMB**
    * 按功能拆分，分阶段交付
    * 后续功能迭代另议
  * 可签合同，支持阶段验收与付款

* * *

### 联系方式

  * TG：ZXZhbnBsdXM= 
  * 请联系时 **简单说明是否有 eBay 或跨境平台相关开发经验（做过哪些模块即可）**

postTitle: 【远程/日结】诚招 Vue 3.4 + Uni-app 前端高手，专注 Bug 调试与性能优化（高工时优先）
jobTitle: Vue 3.4 + Uni-app 前端开发工程师
descContent:
项目背景】 我们目前有稳定的医药/商城类跨境项目，技术栈已升级至 Vue 3.4 + Uni-app。由于业务处于爆发期，现有的代码结构和多端兼容性需要进一步优化与维护。我们需要一位技术过硬、执行力强、且能保持高频沟通的伙伴加入。

【工作内容】

深度排查 Bug： 解决 Vue 3.4 响应式逻辑、Uni-app 多端（H5/小程序/App）兼容性等疑难杂症。

性能优化： 针对加载速度、包体积、内存泄漏等进行系统性调优。

功能维护： 根据需求快速迭代，并重构部分冗余代码。

代码审查： 提高现有代码的可读性与健壮性。

【我们需要这样的你】

技术栈： 精通 Vue 3.4 (Composition API)、Uni-app、Pinia、TypeScript。

经验： 至少 3 年以上前端开发经验，有独立解决复杂 Bug 的能力（尤其是那种“退出就掉登录”或“接口 404”的问题）。

时间： 硬性要求。最好全天在线，每天能保证 10 小时以上 的投入时间。我们任务量充足，能者多劳。

素质： 沟通顺畅，不玩消失。对代码有追求，不写“屎山”。

【薪资待遇】

时薪： 60 元/小时。

结算方式： 日结！日结！日结！（每天核对工时后立即转账，绝不拖欠，给足安全感）。

工作地点： 全远程，在家办公，自由灵活。

【投递方式】

请站内私信我，或备注“电鸭前端-Vue3”   

投递建议： 简单介绍下你的开发经验，如果能带上你处理过的“最难 Bug”案例或 GitHub 地址将大大增加录用概率。

postTitle: 【外包/远程】招 UI 设计师，SaaS/CRM 类产品（需基于 Element UI 设计），长期合作
descContent:
**【项目背景】** 我们目前正在开发一款面向跨境电商/出海业务的 **SaaS 客服与 CRM 管理系统**。产品逻辑已跑通，需要一位专业的 UI 设计师对界面进行设计。 **特别说明：** 为了提高前端开发效率，我们需要设计严格遵循 **Element UI** 的设计规范。

**【工作内容】**

1.  **基于 Element UI 设计：**
    
    *   必须使用 Element UI 的官方设计资源（Figma/Sketch 组件库）进行设计。
        
    *   在满足业务需求的前提下，**优先使用标准组件**（如表单、表格、弹窗、按钮等），尽量减少非标准化的异形设计，降低前端还原成本。
        
2.  **参考竞品优化：**
    
    *   我们已有 5 个明确的对标竞品，需结合竞品逻辑和我们的品牌调性输出设计。
        
3.  **主要界面：**
    
    *   PC 端管理后台 Dashboard
        
    *   IM 聊天聚合窗口（需重点优化交互体验）
        
    *   复杂数据表格与配置页面
        

**【对你的要求】**

1.  **熟悉组件化设计：** 熟练掌握 Element UI (Vue) 或 Ant Design 等 B 端设计规范，清楚哪些效果是组件自带的，哪些是需要额外开发的。
    
2.  **SaaS 设计经验：** 有 B 端后台、CRM 产品设计经验（请附带相关作品集）。
    
3.  **交付规范：** 交付 Figma 或 Sketch 源文件，且图层结构清晰，标注明确。
    

**【合作流程】**

1.  私聊发作品集（请标注是否使用过 UI Kit 设计）+ 简单报价。
    
2.  我方发送具体的 **5 个对标竞品** 和详细功能列表。
    
3.  确认风格与组件规范后，正常开工。

jobTitle: 独立开发团队/工作室（Node.js + 小程序）
descContent:
**【项目背景】** 我们是一个位于上海的初创团队，正在孵化一款面向未来的**新型社交平台**。 目前项目处于**保密开发阶段**。 我们不是那种“只差一个程序员”的草台班子。**创始人为连续创业者，团队已有PM、tech lead、运营**，产品逻辑、UI 原型、技术架构均已梳理清晰。现在需要一支战斗力强的技术团队协助我们完成第一期的落地，如果合作顺利可以长期合作，或者未来转为内部团队。

**【我们寻找的团队】** 我们需要的是**成型的开发小组**或**成熟的独立开发者团队**（后端+前端）。 希望你们：

1.  **有极强的责任心，只认代码和交付**，不搞虚的
2.  有丰富的**从0到1**上线微信小程序的经验
3.  习惯远程协作，沟通高效，代码规范

**【技术栈要求】** 由我方 Tech Lead 把关，技术栈已锁定，不接受更换：

**前端 (Frontend)**

*   精通 **TypeScript**、CSS。
*   精通 **原生微信小程序** 开发框架（我们看重原生体验）。
*   必须具备：从账号注册、开发、联调测试、审核发布到最终上线的**全流程经验**。
*   熟悉**微信支付**接入流程，有实际支付类项目经验者优先。

**后端 (Backend)**

*   精通 **Node.js** 环境下的服务端开发。
*   必须使用 **TypeScript** 进行后端开发。
*   熟悉 **MySQL** 或 **MongoDB** 数据库的设计与优化。
*   精通微信生态的接口逻辑：包括微信一键登录、用户信息解密、**支付回调 (Callback)** 处理等服务端核心逻辑。

**【合作形式】**

*   **模式：** 项目制整包（Project-based）
*   **协作：** 远程开发。但我方 Tech Lead 会进行 Code Review 和进度管理。
*   **预算：** 市场价格，依据评估工作量后商定。

**【如何联系】** 为了节省双方时间，请直接发送邮件。邮件标题请注明：** **\[技术接包\] 团队名称/个人姓名 - 擅长技术栈** **邮件内请务必包含：**
1.  团队/个人简介（人数、简历、项目经理、过往配合时间）
2.  **GitHub****个人主页链接或小程序链接**（这是我们筛选的第一标准）
3. 过往上线过的**小程序案例**（带有支付功能）
jobCategory: 前端开发,后端开发,全栈开发,项目管理

postTitle: 【远程/可兼职】全栈工程师（React + GraphQL + Node + TypeScript）（AI+智慧养殖）
descContent:
## 公司与项目介绍

我们是一个依托于成熟企业孵化的创新团队，致力于通过 AI 与数字化技术赋能传统的养殖行业。我们正在开发一套从 0 到 1 的企业级综合管理系统，旨在解决传统养殖场景下的数据孤岛问题。

不同于常规外包项目，你既能享受大公司的资金稳定性，又能拥有初创团队的高自由度与轻松氛围。加入我们，你将参与构建涵盖微信小程序、Web 管理端以及 GraphQL 后端的核心架构，拥有巨大的技术发挥、学习和上升空间。

## 岗位职责
* 多端系统研发：负责基于 React 生态的 Web 管理端（NextJS）与微信小程序（Taro/React）的功能开发与维护。
* 后端 API 设计： 基于 NodeJS 设计并实现高效的 GraphQL API（Apollo Server），确保前后端数据交互的灵活性与高性能。
* 数据库架构： 负责 MongoDB 的数据模型设计与优化，确保业务数据存储的规范性与扩展性。
* 工程化落地： 参与建立规范的 CI/CD 流程，利用 AI 辅助工具（如 Cursor）提升代码质量与开发效率。

## 职位要求
* 核心语言： 精通 TypeScript，具备扎实的类型系统理解能力。
* 前端技术： 熟练掌握 ReactJS 及 NextJS 框架；有微信小程序开发经验（熟悉 Taro 或类似 React 跨端框架者优先）。
* 后端技术： 深入理解 NodeJS，熟练使用 GraphQL 生态（Apollo Server/Client）进行 API 开发，有实际项目落地经验。
* 数据库： 熟悉 MongoDB 及 Mongoose，能够独立进行 Schema 设计。
* AI 协作： 善用各类 AI 编程辅助工具进行代码生成与问题排查，拥抱高效率开发模式。
* 全栈思维： 能够独立完成从数据库到前端页面的全链路开发；如果你目前在某一端（前端/后端）有极深造诣，并有强烈的意愿和能力快速补齐另一端的技术栈，我们也热切欢迎。

## 薪资与合作方式
* 薪资待遇： 薪资根据负责模块的复杂度透明核定。除了基础薪酬，长期合作者将有机会获得期权，享受项目成长红利。
* 结算方式： 初期按项目模块或按天结算，磨合顺利后考虑转为全职工资。
* 工作模式： 100% 远程协作，无需坐班。
* 时间要求： 弹性工作制，但需保证在约定的核心协作时间内响应及时。我们寻找的是能长期稳定输出、有责任心的技术伙伴，而非短期零工。

## 申请方式
请发送常用技术栈、简历及能够证明你技术实力的作品集（GitHub 仓库链接或过往上线的企业级项目演示）至我的邮箱。 初筛通过后，我们将进一步沟通具体的技术细节与合作方案。
salary: 按模块/天结算，可转全职
jobCategory: 全栈开发,前端开发,后端开发,AI

postTitle: 【全职远程】 15K-20K/运营与增长负责人/AI 音乐和视频创作平台
descContent:
## 公司简介
我们是一家专注于 AI 音乐/视频 创作方向的技术公司，全球首个覆盖音乐生成、数字艺人、MV、音色克隆与发行的一站式平台，实现从创作到分发的完整链路打通。
数字艺人与 MV 生成模型在一致性与表现力方面表现领先，整体效果优于当前主流视频生成模型。
产品自 Day One 即实现盈利，并保持真实需求驱动的稳定增长，团队正在面向全球市场扩展生态。

## 岗位职责
你将负责公司的内容增长策略与全球化表达，是内容与增长链路的核心负责人。

主要工作包括：
	•	全球化增长：主导海外与国内市场的内容营销与创作者/红人对接，跑通增长链路
	•	内容打法制定：结合「AI 音乐 + MV + 数字艺人」能力制作具示范作用的标杆内容
	•	UGC 生态建设：引导用户参与内容创作并形成二创与循环传播
	•	社区增长：利用平台内容基础与用户素材，提升社区参与度与内容留存
	•	数据分析与闭环：提炼内容增长方法论，并可通过团队或机制复制放大

## 任职要求

经验要求
	•	3 年以上内容增长经验，曾负责至少一个成功增长项目
	•	对 AI 视频内容领域具备深度兴趣或经验，熟悉内容生产工具与分发生态
	•	熟悉 UGC 模式、社区逻辑、创作者心智与内容分发渠道

能力特征
	•	能从 0→1 定义增长打法，也能亲自打样与推动执行
	•	对用户、创作者与社区运营有真实理解，而非只停留在策略层
	•	强执行力、高自驱、目标导向、不需要被管理才能推进
	•	对作品质量与内容审美有判断能力，能做出作品

加分项
	•	有音乐视频、MV、AI 内容或二创相关经验
	•	熟悉 TikTok /  抖音 / B 站 / 小红书 等平台生态
	•	有市场增长经验

## 薪酬福利
	•	远程办公（Remote），无需坐班
	•	参与核心业务决策，有充分施展空间
	•	月薪 15K - 20K 的薪资报酬，每月1号发工资
	•	高速成长与扩张期，奖金丰厚

## 招聘流程
简历初筛
视频面试 1-2 轮


## 其他信息
简历请投递邮箱
如果你有作品、案例、账号或增长实绩，请一并附上，这将显著提升沟通效率

postTitle: 【免费推荐/全职远程】20K-30K/Product Designer/公共问题上报处理平台
descContent:
**此岗位已委托电鸭社区[【人才库】](https://talent.eleduck.com/)进行候选人推荐**

⚠️ 人才库职位编号：708

# Who we are

We are a leading platform for reporting community issues across Australia and New Zealand. We empower hundreds of thousands of users to improve their shared spaces by reporting everything from fallen trees to accessibility issues.
We provide over 850 organizations — our "Solvers" — with a cloud-based SaaS platform to understand, triage and solve reports. From councils across Australia to utilities like Telstra and NBN, we help them move the needle on community maintenance. With over 7 million reports sent, we’re a high-impact tech company on a mission to be the go-to platform for communities everywhere.

# What we’re looking for

- A versatile designer who strives to design beautiful, accessible web and mobile experiences that people love to use. 

- You’re excited about the intersection of great design and AI and possess the expertise to build scalable design systems while moving quickly in a growth-stage tech company.

# As our new Product Designer, you’ll be:

● Designing Across Channels: Creating seamless and cohesive user journeys across our mobile app (iOS/Android), responsive webforms, and complex partner portals.

● Building with AI (xAI): Applying Explainable AI principles to ensure our automated features are transparent, trustworthy, and enhance—rather than replace—the human experience.

● Evolving the Design System: Maintaining and scaling our design library in Figma to ensure visual consistency and speed for both the design and engineering teams.

● Partnering on Discovery: Working closely with the PM to turn discovery insights and user feedback into high-fidelity prototypes and validated designs.

● Navigating Priorities: Transitioning seamlessly between shipping immediate UI improvements ("quick wins") and architecting the long-term UX value of the platform.

● Prototyping & Testing: Rapidly concepting and testing ideas to determine product-market fit and ensuring our solutions solve real-world community problems.

# About you

***Essential***

● Scale-up DNA: Previous experience in a small but rapidly growing tech business. You understand how to maintain high design standards while moving at scale-up pace.

● Multi-channel Portfolio: A strong body of work showcasing your ability to design for both native mobile apps and high-density web dashboards/SaaS products.

● AI/xAI Curiosity: A deep interest in or practical experience with designing interfaces that leverage AI, with a focus on user trust and agency.

● Design System Mastery: High proficiency in Figma and experience managing or contributing to component-based design systems.

● Collaborative Mindset: Excellent communication skills and the ability to work as a "thought partner" to Product Managers and Engineers.

● Communication: Strong communication skills and a proactive, ownership-driven mindset

***Desired***

● Accessibility Focus: A strong understanding of WCAG standards and inclusive design practices.

● Prototyping Skills: Experience with advanced prototyping to test complex interactions before they hit development.

● Commercial awareness: An understanding of how design decisions impact business goals and user retention.

# What we offer

● A flexible work environment where you will be working fully remote

● Clear and predictable core collaboration hours aligned with UTC+8 / Australia-friendly time zones

● **CNY 20k to 30k per month** (super need to be self-arranged) plus bonus

● A purpose-driven business that aims to make a positive impact on our communities and driven by values to:

○ Empower everyone
○ Think big, then go for it
○ Move the needle
○ Connect genuinely and generously
○ Seek simplicity

# Application

● English requirement: Please make sure you have work proficiency in English (Listening, Speaking, Reading and Writing). You need to confidently work in a pure English environment. All the documents provided should be written in English. All the interviews will be conducted in English
● Process
○ Screening: submit CV and portfolio
○ Interviews: 2 round of interviews with our product team
○ Decision: Decision and Feedback will be given within 2 weeks after the last interview.

# 如何申请

*   此岗位已委托电鸭社区[【人才库】](https://talent.eleduck.com/)进行候选人推荐；职位编号：708。
    
*   自觉合适的同学，请直接点击下方“申请该职位”主动申请（人才库职位无需电量）；
    
    *   初次申请的同学，需连同简历一起提交至人才库；一次提交，可享受长期推荐。
    *   之前已加入过人才库的同学，只需填写本次申请理由，即可提交申请。
*   提交后，请[下载电鸭APP](https://eleduck.com/posts/yGfd9x)，最晚3个工作日内，可收到关于此次申请的消息及通知。
    
*   本次申请没有成功的，也不用灰心，人才库之后会继续推荐更适合你的远程机会

postTitle: Creative AI Enablement Specialist at Superside
jobTitle: Creative AI Enablement Specialist at Superside
descContent:
Superside is hiring a **Creative AI Enablement Specialist** to help scale how
our creative teams adopt and use AI in real work. You’ll sit within our
Learning, Enablement, and Transformation team, partnering closely with our
Creative AI Enablement Senior Manager to design, deliver, and support hands-on
AI learning experiences for creatives across disciplines.

  

This role is ideal for someone who understands creative workflows, actively
uses AI tools, and enjoys helping others build confidence, speed, and quality
through practical enablement.

Superside is hiring a **Creative AI Enablement Specialist** to help scale how
our creative teams adopt and use AI in real work. You’ll sit within our
Learning, Enablement, and Transformation team, partnering closely with our
Creative AI Enablement Senior Manager to design, deliver, and support hands-on
AI learning experiences for creatives across disciplines.

  

This role is ideal for someone who understands creative workflows, actively
uses AI tools, and enjoys helping others build confidence, speed, and quality
through practical enablement.

### What You'll Do

* Support the design and delivery of AI bootcamps and upskilling initiatives for creative [teams.Create](http://teams.Create) clear, practical learning materials that translate complex AI concepts into usable workflows. 
* Co-lead workshops and coaching sessions, helping creatives apply AI tools in day-to-day production. 
* Provide hands-on support during training sessions, troubleshooting tools and workflows in real time. 
* Adapt quickly to evolving enablement needs, contributing across learning, experimentation, and rollout projects.

### What We’re Looking For

* Extensive experience in creative AI, including knowledge of node structure tools and cutting-edge AI workflows.
* Previous experience with instructional design or coaching, with proven ability to present and facilitate group learning sessions, making complex topics engaging and understandable.
* A flexible and agile mindset, ready to pivot and support different facets of the Learning, Enablement, and Transformation team’s journey.

**Why Join us?**

  

Superside's vision is to create equal opportunities globally by accelerating
the world’s transition to online work. With that in mind, we're building a
fully remote company that attracts people where they are.

  

**Remote-first. Customer-led.**

Remote isn’t just a perk; it’s how we deliver better for customers. We are
fully committing to our customers by hiring top talent and collaborating
seamlessly across time zones.

**Global team, local impact.**

Join a community of 60+ nationalities working across time zones, cultures, and
disciplines, all aligned on doing great work for great brands.

**High performance, low ego.**

Work in a fast-paced, high-trust environment where feedback is direct, growth
is constant, and kindness leads collaboration.

**Impact meets opportunity.**

We’re in the sweet spot — big enough to be stable, small enough for you to
shape what’s next. Your ideas will matter here.

**Grow fast. Lead well.**

You’ll gain mentorship, take on real responsibility, and grow your career
while helping us disrupt a global industry.

  

**About Superside**

  

Superside is the leading AI-powered creative company that quickly and cost-
effectively enhances in-house functions. We help over 500 ambitious brands get
great creative concepts done at scale. Built to be an extension

of in-house teams, we unbottleneck marketing and creative teams so they can
move faster and drive more reliable creative performance.

Superside is a fully remote company with over 700 team members working across
60+ countries and 13 timezones.

  

Learn more at [superside.com](http://superside.com)

  

**Diversity, Equity and Inclusion**

  

We’re an equal-opportunity company. All applicants will be considered
regardless of ethnicity, appearance, religion, gender identity, sexual
orientation, national origin, veteran or disability status.

postTitle: Sr. Front-End Engineer, Product at Zora
jobTitle: Sr. Front-End Engineer, Product at Zora
descContent:
### About Us:

Zora is a new kind of on-chain social network where you can express yourself
freely, connect with others, and discover the value of your imagination. We
believe that by using crypto, we can enable a more equitable system for
creators, fundamentally rediscovering the power of the internet.

We’re working tirelessly to make Zora available to as many people as possible
with a simple, fun, and rewarding consumer app. Our
[mission](https://zora.co/about) is to make creating on the internet free and
valuable.

### About The Role:

We’re looking for an experienced product-focused front-end engineer to join
our Trade team, building out the core trading experiences that power hundreds
of millions in onchain volume on Zora. You’ll own and evolve existing trade
features, as well as shape new features from design to launch.

### What You'll Do:

  * Work closely with Product Managers, Designers, and Engineers across the stack to build and continuously improve trading-related features
  * Develop and maintain performant, scalable user interfaces across mobile and web
  * Take ownership of projects end-to-end, working independently while seeking guidance from senior peers and managers as needed
  * Communicate status, updates, blockers, etc., to cross-functional stakeholders
  * Respond to incidents as part of an on-call rotation
  * Participate in RFC and code review

### What We're Looking For:

  * 4+ years of professional experience as a Software Engineer
  * Strong technical background building consumer- or user-facing applications at scale using React/React Native
  * Experience moving across the stack when needed (Python and Solidity)
  * You’re comfortable working through the product lifecycle, partnering closely with Designers, Engineers, and Product Managers to bring ideas to life
  * You have a strong product sense and keep user needs front and center when building and improving features
  * Familiarity with crypto features and concepts
  * A desire to keep up with modern best practices in software development and Web3
  * EU or U.S. (EST) time zone

### **Here's the Pay Range:**

At Zora, we carefully consider a variety of factors to determine compensation
for each position, including the role, level, and work. The US base salary
range for this position is:

  * Pay Range: $160,000 - $200,000 base salary + equity + tokens

This reflects the compensation target for new hire salaries for the position
across all US locations. Please note, the compensation details provided do not
include benefits and perks that we offer.

We also rely on market indicators along with considering your work location,
job related skills, experience and relevant education and training, to
determine compensation that is fair and competitive for you. Zora will
consider paying compensation near the higher of the range in exceptional
circumstances, where candidates have the experience, credentials or expertise
that would warrant such consideration. It is always our goal to hire
exceptional talent and we would be happy to share more about compensation
during the hiring process.

Zora is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We do not discriminate against
qualified applicants or employees on the basis of race, color, religion,
gender identity, sex, sexual preference, sexual identity, pregnancy, national

postTitle: AI Enablement and Project Specialist at Superside
jobTitle: AI Enablement and Project Specialist at Superside
descContent:
As an AI Enablement and Project Specialist on our Learning, Enablement and
Transformation team, you will play a crucial role in bridging the gap between
operational excellence and creative enablement.

  

You will support both our AI Enablement and Transformation Manager and our
Creative AI Enablement Senior Manager to ensure that our creative teams and
project managers are fully equipped to adopt AI in their work.

As an AI Enablement and Project Specialist on our Learning, Enablement and
Transformation team, you will play a crucial role in bridging the gap between
operational excellence and creative enablement.

  

You will support both our AI Enablement and Transformation Manager and our
Creative AI Enablement Senior Manager to ensure that our creative teams and
project managers are fully equipped to adopt AI in their work.

### What You’ll Do

* **AI Bootcamps & Upskilling Initiatives:** Collaborate closely on AI bootcamps and other upskilling initiatives, providing hands-on support in developing and delivering learning content.
* **Learning Content Creation:** Assist in the creation of engaging instructional materials that make complex AI concepts accessible and easy to grasp for creative teams.
* **Workshops & Coaching:** Facilitate and co-lead workshops or coaching sessions, helping creatives integrate AI into their daily workflows.
* **Agile Team Support:** Adapt quickly to evolving team needs and be a flexible, agile contributor across various Learning, Enablement and Transformation projects.

### What We’re Looking For

* Experience in project management or operational coordination within a creative, agency, or fast-paced environment.
* Hands-on familiarity with applying AI tools to project management and creative workflows. 
* Ability to create clear, practical learning content and support live training sessions. 
* Strong organizational skills with attention to detail and follow-through.
* Collaborative, adaptable mindset with comfort operating in a hybrid [role.Clear](http://role.Clear) written and verbal English communication skills.

**Why Join us?**

  

Superside's vision is to create equal opportunities globally by accelerating
the world’s transition to online work. With that in mind, we're building a
fully remote company that attracts people where they are.

  

**Remote-first. Customer-led.**

Remote isn’t just a perk; it’s how we deliver better for customers. We are
fully committing to our customers by hiring top talent and collaborating
seamlessly across time zones.

**Global team, local impact.**

Join a community of 60+ nationalities working across time zones, cultures, and
disciplines, all aligned on doing great work for great brands.

**High performance, low ego.**

Work in a fast-paced, high-trust environment where feedback is direct, growth
is constant, and kindness leads collaboration.

**Impact meets opportunity.**

We’re in the sweet spot — big enough to be stable, small enough for you to
shape what’s next. Your ideas will matter here.

**Grow fast. Lead well.**

You’ll gain mentorship, take on real responsibility, and grow your career
while helping us disrupt a global industry.

  

**About Superside**

  

Superside is the leading AI-powered creative company that quickly and cost-
effectively enhances in-house functions. We help over 500 ambitious brands get
great creative concepts done at scale. Built to be an extension

of in-house teams, we unbottleneck marketing and creative teams so they can
move faster and drive more reliable creative performance.

Superside is a fully remote company with over 700 team members working across
60+ countries and 13 timezones.

  

Learn more at [superside.com](http://superside.com)

  

**Diversity, Equity and Inclusion**

  

We’re an equal-opportunity company. All applicants will be considered
regardless of ethnicity, appearance, religion, gender identity, sexual
orientation, national origin, veteran or disability status.

postTitle: Ruby on Rails 后端工程师招聘（远程）
jobTitle: Ruby on Rails 后端工程师
descContent:
## Ruby on Rails 后端工程师（远程 ）

### 职位概述

我们正在寻找一名 **Ruby on Rails 工程师** ，参与实际业务系统的开发与维护。 你将以 **远程办公**
的形式加入项目，**按实际工时结算薪资** ，合作方式灵活，适合自由职业者或希望长期远程合作的开发者。

* * *

### 工作内容

  * 使用 **Ruby on Rails** 进行 Web 后端功能开发与维护
  * 参与业务需求的技术实现，与产品/设计协作落地功能
  * 编写结构清晰、可维护的代码，并进行必要的调试与优化
  * 根据项目需要，参与 API 设计、数据库建模等工作
  * 通过文档、Issue 或英文技术资料理解并解决问题

* * *

### 任职要求

  * 熟悉 **Ruby on Rails** ，具备实际项目开发经验

  * 掌握基本的 Web 开发知识（ HTTP 、RESTful 、数据库等）

  * 熟悉常见数据库（如 PostgreSQL / MySQL ）

  * 具备 **基础英文读写能力**

  * 能阅读英文技术文档、Issue 、报错信息

  * 能进行简单的英文技术沟通（不要求口语流利）

  * 具备良好的自我管理能力，能够适应远程协作

  * 对代码质量负责，有持续学习和改进的意识

* * *

### 加分项（非必须）

  * 有远程工作或自由职业经验
  * 熟悉 RSpec 、Sidekiq 、Redis 、API 设计等 Rails 常见生态
  * 有性能优化、系统重构经验
  * 熟悉 Git / GitHub 协作流程

* * *

### 合作方式 & 薪资

  * **工作方式** ：远程办公

  * **计薪方式** ：按工时结算

  * **薪资范围** ：**80 – 140 元人民币 / 小时**

  * 具体根据技术水平、合作稳定性综合确定

  * 工时与任务透明，长期合作优先

* * *

### 我们能提供

  * 灵活、尊重专业的合作方式
  * 清晰的需求沟通，不无意义加班
  * 有技术挑战、能真正落地的项目
  * 长期合作机会（不是一次性外包）

### 如有意向，请投递简历至 shouming@paramountventures.io

postTitle: 招聘：电商AI自动化集成优化师（DeepSeek + Dify 方向）
jobTitle: 电商AI自动化集成优化师
descContent:
**【项目背景】**  
我们已完成基础基建：阿里云服务器（2核4G）、Dify社区版、DeepSeek-R1付费接口、影刀RPA软件。现需要一名专家将这些工具打通，实现**“京东/天猫后台数据自动抓取 -> Dify 知识库清洗 -> DeepSeek 深度分析 -> 结果自动返还”**的全链路闭环。

**【核心职责】**

1.  **影刀端数据攻坚：** 负责京东商智等平台复杂页面（多层Iframe、动态ID、加密接口）的稳定抓取。确保数据能够以结构化（JSON/CSV）形式实时产出。
2.  **Dify 工作流搭建：** 在 Dify 中设计高度逻辑化的 Workflow。利用 DeepSeek-R1 的推理能力，对电商原始数据进行归因分析（如：为什么昨天转化率跌了？）。
3.  **API 链路打通：** 编写脚本实现影刀与 Dify API 的对接，确保抓取后的数据能自动触发 Dify 的工作流并完成入库或分析。
4.  **性能调优（针对2核4G配置）：** 优化 Dify 在阿里云低配服务器上的运行效率，合理配置 Docker 容器资源与向量数据库。

**【技术要求】**

1.  **精通影刀RPA：** 必须有处理**商智/生意参谋**高强度反爬、动态元素定位的实战案例（不接受只会录制流程的新手）。
2.  **熟悉 Dify 环境：** 能够熟练配置 Dify 的 Agent 节点、知识库（RAG）和变量传递，懂如何通过 API 触发工作流。
3.  **懂 DeepSeek 调优：** 擅长编写针对 DeepSeek-R1 推理模型的 Prompt（提示词），减少幻觉，确保分析结果符合电商逻辑。
4.  **Python 基础：** 能在阿里云 Linux 环境下进行简单的 Docker 维护、接口联调脚本编写。
5. 熟悉电商优先

postTitle: 资深后端开发工程师（远程，薪资范围10k-20k）
descContent:
我们是一家专注于**AI音乐创作**的技术驱动型创业公司，致力于打造下一代智能音乐创作平台。

### **岗位职责**

1. **移动端专属后端架构与开发**：设计、开发并维护专为移动应用优化的后端服务体系，确保服务在**移动网络环境下的高可用性、低延迟与低能耗**。
2. **AI能力移动端集成与优化**：将团队自研的**MelodyLM**等大模型能力，通过高度优化的API提供给移动端。重点解决**移动端模型轻量化、推理请求的合并与调度、流式生成结果的推送**等移动场景特有问题。
3. **移动端数据同步与存储策略**：设计并实现适用于音乐创作场景的**高效数据同步机制**（如多轨工程的增量同步、冲突解决）及**智能缓存策略**，支撑移动端的流畅编辑与离线创作体验。
4. **移动平台特性功能支持**：
   - 构建稳定可靠的**移动推送服务**，及时通知用户生成完成、协作邀请等信息。
   - 实现与移动端深度集成的**用户认证、安全及隐私数据保护方案**。
   - 优化音频文件在移动网络下的**上传、下载与流式播放体验**。
5. **性能监控与优化**：建立面向移动端的服务端监控体系，持续分析并优化API性能、网络流量及电池消耗，提升全球用户的整体使用体验。

### **任职要求**

**【基本要求】**

- 本科及以上学历，计算机相关专业，**3年以上后端开发经验，其中至少1年专注于服务移动App的后端开发**。
- 深刻理解移动应用的特有需求（网络、性能、功耗、安全）及其对后端架构的影响。
- 具备良好的系统设计能力和复杂业务模块的实现能力。

**【技术栈与能力要求】**

- **后端核心**：精通 **Go/Python/Java** 中至少一门语言，有构建高并发、可扩展API服务的实战经验。
- **移动端服务经验**：**必须**具备为iOS/Android应用设计和开发后端服务的经验，熟悉移动端API设计的最佳实践（如数据精简、请求合并、错误重试等）。
- **数据存储与同步**：精通数据库设计，并有实现**数据离线存储、在线同步、冲突解决**机制的实际经验。熟悉SQLite与云端数据库的协同方案者优先。
- **云原生与DevOps**：熟悉Docker、Kubernetes及主流云服务，能构建自动化的CI/CD流程，保障移动后端服务的快速迭代与稳定部署。
- **网络与性能优化**：对TCP/IP、HTTP/2、WebSocket有深入理解，能针对移动网络不稳定特性进行服务端优化。

**【领域技能加分项】**

- 有**AI模型移动端部署或服务化**经验，了解如何在资源受限条件下高效提供AI能力。
- 有**音视频流媒体**或**大型文件断点续传**服务开发经验。
- 熟悉移动端推送服务（如APNs、FCM）的集成与后端实现。
- 对音乐产品有热情，了解移动端音视频处理的基本挑战。

descContent:
**We are looking for expert RoR and React developers who are quick learners

postTitle: B2B Online Company Stores Manager
descContent:
**About the Company Stores Manager position:  
** If you have experience in ecommerce for the print & promotional industry
and are looking to grow to the next level in management and/or for an
opportunity at a growing company, this job might be a great fit for you.
OnePoint is a thriving company with an ecommerce department that is growing
and evolving. If you love problem solving and project management, then keep
reading. This position offers you the opportunity to grow in your management
skills and help shape a department as it grows. We strive to solve order
efficiency and branding problems with our ecommerce solutions. You will have
one full-time and one part-time person reporting to you.

**The Perfect Candidate:  
** The perfect candidate for this position would be someone already in the
print & promotion industry with ecommerce experience. You are someone who
excels at big picture thinking while still able to pay attention to the little
details. You are an excellent creative and critical thinker. You are extremely
organized and can keep multiple projects on tasks. You enjoy being the driving
force to make our stores are the best they can be for the customer. You are
someone who understands production workflows and processes. You are currently
managing a small team or ready to step up and manage a small and growing team.

**Key Responsibilities**

· Develop and execute the ecommerce growth strategy for customer portals.

· Manage day-to-day operations of the ecommerce sites and digital ordering
tools.

· Build optimized product catalogs including pricing, variants, decoration
methods, and lead times.

· Oversee UX, content, navigation, search, and personalization of sites.

· Optimize ordering workflows for decorated/custom products.

· Ensure data accuracy across inventory and product specs.

· Manage integrations with vendors for production.

· Lead testing, continuous improvement, and roadmap initiatives.

· Manage store builds and communication with the customer, as well as
development.

· Manage and work with the Proforma ecommerce team to oversee custom
development request.

**Qualifications:**

· 3–5+ years of **ecommerce experience** ,****preferably in******print,
promotional products, merchandising, or manufacturing.**

· Strong customer relations attitude.

· Ability to work cross-functionally with other departments, to promote best
practices, and to develop solutions to business challenges.

**· **Excellent working knowledge of Microsoft Office – Excel, Outlook, Word,
Teams, etc.

**· **Strong understanding of **product customization workflows and B2B
ordering.**

· Experience with platforms such as Shopify, BigCommerce, Magento, or custom
B2B portals.

· Data-driven mindset with strong analytical and reporting skills.

· Excellent project management, communication, and cross-functional leadership
skills.

· Comfortable working in a fast-paced, growth-focused environment.

· Some knowledge of basic HTML coding – the more the better.

· Very comfortable being client facing – You will be assisting in company
store demos and are required to be on weekly status calls with the customer
overseeing new store builds.

**Nice to Have:**

· Experience with ASI, SAGE, or DistributorCentral

· Knowledge of print decoration methods (screen print, embroidery, DTG, heat
press, large format, etc.)

· Experience with SEO, email automation, Google Analytics, and digital ads

· Familiarity with ERP/CRM integrations and order management systems.

postTitle: Project Manager
descContent:
The Project Manager is a client-facing role at the center of everything we do.  
  

Running high-impact A/B tests requires coordination across many
disciplines—research, strategy, design, copywriting, development, QA,
analytics, and client stakeholders. Your job is to keep everything moving
forward, aligned, and energized.

## Key Responsibilities

You’ll own three core responsibilities:

  1. **Coordination**. You’ll manage cross-functional teams of 5–10 people and ensure tests move smoothly from idea → build → launch → analysis. You’ll spot risks early, unblock teams, and make sure nothing falls through the cracks.
  2. **Strategy & Planning.** You’ll help build and maintain a testing roadmap of 10–20 upcoming experiments. You’ll communicate the “why” behind the plan, set expectations, and walk clients through progress and results in weekly meetings.
  3. **Energy (“Vibes”).** You’re the main point of contact for clients and internal teams. You bring clarity, positivity, and momentum. When things get busy or complicated, you keep people focused and motivated.

## Skills, Knowledge and Traits

You do not need prior A/B testing experience or even formal project management
experience. We will train you. Here’s what we need from you:

  1. **Organization and diligence.** You like systems, checklists, and timelines. You front-load work, plan ahead, and don’t stop until things are finished properly.
  2. **Communication.** You default to over-communication. You proactively reach out to clients and teammates, flag risks early, and ask for help when you need it.
  3. **Smart and high agency.** You learn quickly, enjoy technology and design, and want to understand why things work (or don’t. You’re the kind of person who notices patterns and asks good questions.

## What You’ll Get

  * **Clear promotion opportunities.** We invest heavily in training and promote almost exclusively from within. Most leaders at Spiralyze started in entry-level roles.
  * **Tech reimbursement.** Need a better computer, monitor, or setup? Want training on Figma or GA4? We’ll help.
  * **In-demand skills.** You’ll learn Conversion Rate Optimization from the most experienced experimentation teams in the world.
  * **Time to recharge.** 20 days of paid vacation plus holidays.

If you’re excited about working with smart people, solving real problems, and
growing fast in a merit-based environment, we’d love to hear from you.

* * *

postTitle: 远程高级 PHP
jobTitle: 远程高级 PHP 工程师
descContent:
远程高级 PHP：需求 5 名  
薪资：面议，可谈  
\------  
1.负责核心业务的 高并发 / 大流量系统设计与研发，包括 QPS 、P99 、容量预估、热点缓存、无状态扩缩等场景。  
2.负责业务服务端的 性能优化：路由、连接池、查询与缓存、Opcache 、静态化、队列等。  
3.负责服务端 高可用与稳定性 建设：限流、降级、熔断、重试、超时、报警、灰度/回滚。  
4.参与数据库体系结构优化：表结构、索引、分库分表、业务一致性、数据迁移方案。  
5.推动工程体系：单元测试、集成测试、CI/CD 、监控体系、日志追踪、代码规范（ PSR ）。  
6.参与系统架构评审，产出技术方案文档，推动跨团队落地。  
  
要求  
1.PHP 经验 5 年以上，精通 PHP 编程，熟悉 PHP 7→8 迁移与兼容方案。  
2.熟悉 MVC 与主流框架（ Yaf/Yii/Laravel 等），能独立进行架构搭建与优化。  
3.高并发经验：熟悉路由、连接池、缓存、异步任务（ Yaf + CLI/Crontab ）、Opcache 等。  
4.熟练 Redis / 消息队列（ Kafka/RabbitMQ/Redis Stream ），理解其在高并发场景下的使用与优化。  
5.熟悉 Elasticsearch 索引、聚合、调优，具备排查与优化经验。  
6.熟悉 Swoole / Workerman 中至少一种（加分项）。  
7.前端基础能力：熟练 HTML 、CSS 、JavaScript ，了解 SEO 原理、标签语义化、SSR 及常见 SEO
渲染方式，并理解服务端渲染/静态站点生成原理  
8.数据库优化：具备 MySQL 索引优化、慢 SQL 分析、查询性能提升经验，熟悉 Nginx + PHP-FPM 机制（进程模型、慢日志、连接优化等）。  
9.掌握 Git 工作流，能进行 Code Review 、单元测试、可维护代码（ PHPUnit ）。  
10.具备良好的问题定位与线上故障排查能力（ trace 、日志、CPU/IO 、慢 SQL 等）。  
11.良好的责任心与沟通能力，能够推动跨团队项目落地。  
\---------  
另有 web 前端，Flutter ，IOS ，全栈开发，Golang ，SRE 运维等岗位

postTitle: Senior Cloud Infrastructure Engineer
descContent:
### Role Overview

We’re looking for a **Senior Cloud Infrastructure Engineer** to own and evolve
the cloud foundation that powers Digioh’s multi-tenant SaaS platform.

This is a deeply hands-on role. You will design, build, and operate our Azure
and Cloudflare infrastructure, partner closely with application engineers, and
take full ownership of scalability, reliability, security, and cost efficiency
across environments.

If you enjoy solving hard infrastructure problems, building production systems
at scale, and working without layers of approval, this role is for you

#### Key Responsibilities

**Cloud & Infrastructure Ownership**

  * Design, implement, and operate Azure infrastructure including App Services, Functions, AKS, networking, and identity.
  * Own Cloudflare configuration across WAF, CDN, DNS, rate limiting, and Zero Trust.
  * Ensure high availability, scalability, and resilience for a high-traffic eCommerce SaaS platform.
  * Lead cost optimization efforts while maintaining performance and reliability.
  * Assist in building high-scale cloud applications using modern APIs and Integrations.

**Platform Engineering**

  * Build and maintain the Azure-based platform supporting Digioh’s SaaS applications.
  * Standardize environments across Dev, PreProd, and Prod.
  * Own deployment pipelines, runtime conventions, and operational guardrails.
  * Improve developer experience without sacrificing reliability or security.

**Scalability, availability, and cost optimization**

  * Plan and execute database migrations, including schema evolution, replication, cutovers, and rollback strategies.
  * Partner with engineering teams to diagnose and resolve complex production issues across infrastructure, application, and data layers.

**Qualifications**

  * 8+ years of professional software engineering experience.
  * Deep, hands-on expertise with Azure, .NET / C#, SQL, and JavaScript.
  * Proven experience building and scaling eCommerce SaaS platforms.
  * Strong understanding of ecommerce data flows, APIs, and third-party integrations.
  * Excellent debugging, performance optimization, and architectural skills.
  * Startup mindset: pragmatic, decisive, fast-moving, and ownership-driven.

**Why Join Digioh**

  * 3,000+ customers on a proven SaaS platform with real scale.
  * No investors. No board. No red tape.
  * Direct access to founders and senior leadership.
  * High-impact individual contributor role with real ownership.
  * Fully remote, flexible work focused on outcomes.
  * Competitive compensation based on experience.

We need someone who obsesses over the entire journey: Ad → Landing Page →
Email/SMS → Booking → Treatment. We don't celebrate leads. We celebrate people
walking through the door.

You're a full-stack marketer who's deep in Meta and Google ads but understands
how everything connects. You can write killer ad copy, optimize a landing
page, fix a broken funnel, and explain strategy on a client call.  
  
You'll manage paid advertising for 30-35 medical spa clients and drive the

Collaborate

We're a digital marketing agency exclusively serving 100+ medical spas

postTitle: Customer Success Manager, Digital (VSMB/SMB)
descContent:
## **Who We Are**

Float is the leading resource management software for professional services
teams. Since 2012, we’ve grown every year—independently, self-funded, and
profitably. We’re rated #1 for resource management on G2 and trusted by 4,500+
customers worldwide.

As a [certified B Corporation](https://www.float.com/blog/why-and-how-we-made-
it-official-with-b-corp), we’re committed to making a positive impact on our
team, customers, the environment, and the remote community. Our 60+ person
team works 100% remotely across the globe, with [perks and
benefits](https://www.notion.so/Perks-and-
benefits-1841a06d46528081a119c93f270ec71c?pvs=21) designed to support us in
living our Best Work Life. You'll collaborate with teammates across Australia,
Mexico, the UK, Nigeria, Canada, and the US. Learn more about our data
security practices for employment or service contracts
[here](https://www.notion.so/Data-security-and-protection-
guidelines-5a44ff7c04bb4a55a05873f6d5d7743b?pvs=21). Browse [our
blog](https://www.float.com/blog/) to get a glimpse of life at Float and check
out our [Glassdoor employer
reviews](https://www.glassdoor.com/Overview/Working-at-Float-
EI_IE2055330.11,16.htm). See why our customers love Float [on
G2](https://www.g2.com/products/float-float/reviews) .

We’re on a scale-up journey, and we’re seeking people who thrive in this
stage. We want Float to be the place where you have the autonomy and
opportunity to do the best work of your career.

## **Why We’re Hiring For This Role**

At Float, we’re committed to supporting our customers with care while scaling
sustainably. As part of that journey, we’re expanding our focus on retention
within our VSMB and SMB customer segments, and are committed to building
systems that deliver value at scale without sacrificing the personal
experience.

This role leads that charge. As our first Customer Success Manager fully
focused on a digital-first model, you’ll shape and deliver one-to-many
programs, build proactive engagement strategies, and drive consistent customer
outcomes across a high-volume segment. It’s a critical role at a pivotal
moment, and is designed to strengthen retention, amplify impact, and help
Float evolve toward a smarter, scalable model of customer success.

We’re looking for someone based in the AMER region (North, Central, or South
America!), so that we can ensure our one-to-many programs can support our
client base. That said, you’ll be working asynchronously with a bright,
dedicated team from across the globe, with a strong focus on taking complex
problems and creating solutions that feel simple and intuitive for our
customers.

Our Director of Customer Success, Emily, explains the important role you will
play within our Customer Success team. **[Watch this
video!](https://www.loom.com/share/732e647f38254df99181cf2408f1b03e "Watch
this video!")**

## **What You’ll Be Responsible For**

Early on, you’ll jump right into:

  * **Developing product and customer expertise:** You’ll work on learning and developing working knowledge of Float’s product, customer journey, and existing success strategies to confidently support SMB customers across regions and understand areas of opportunity.
  * **Manage SMB customer portfolio:** Own a book of 3500+ SMB customers, maintaining high-level oversight, and making improvements to existing systems and workflows.
  * **Map and baseline retention metrics:** Deliver a clear, documented view of current retention performance, and identify automation opportunities to improve renewals at scale.

Once you are a bit more settled, we expect that you will jump into the
following areas of ownership:

  * **Building and implementing automations:** Collaborate with your team to design and operationalize a system for managing the VSMB/SMB segments: segmenting accounts by lifecycle stage, engagement level, and renewal risk for consistent tracking and follow-up.
  * **Lead scaled customer programs:** Drive adoption and retention by running one-to-many initiatives such as webinars, group trainings, and automated lifecycle campaigns.
  * **Own digital onboarding for new VSMB SMB customers:** Managing digital-touch onboarding for customers in North America and APAC, ensuring a smooth post-sales experience and early success milestones.
  * **Refine automation and playbooks:** Use customer data and feedback to optimize engagement strategies, continuously improving efficiency and outcomes.

## **What You’ll Need To Be Successful**

We want you to love your work and believe that these skills will allow you to
succeed in the role. Applying these skills requires:

  * **SMB expertise:** Deep understanding of the needs, behaviors, and business rhythms of very small and small-to-medium-sized businesses, with experience managing large volumes of VSB/VSMB accounts.
  * **Churn management:** Proven ability to proactively identify risk and execute strategies to retain accounts and reduce churn across a high-volume book of business.
  * **Scaled program delivery:** Experience designing, managing, and optimizing automations and one-to-many engagement strategies across a globally dispersed customer base.
  * **Customer retention:** Strong track record of driving long-term customer value through targeted retention initiatives and scalable success programs.
  * **Clear communicator:** Confident and articulate written and verbal communicator, capable of explaining technical concepts in a simple, relatable way to a non-technical audience.
  * **Webinar & content delivery:** Comfortable preparing, recording, and hosting live or pre-recorded sessions for one-to-many formats, including webinars and onboarding content.

As a fully remote team, we’re looking for someone comfortable with
asynchronous communication as the default, which means you have previous
remote experience and are comfortable using tools like Slack, Loom, and Linear
to communicate as needed.

## **Why Join Us**

On target earnings for this role is OTE US $120,163 (Level 3), structured as a
90:10 split between base:variable.

Here’s a [blog post](https://www.float.com/blog/why-were-changing-the-way-we-
compensate-at-float/) with more information on how we determine our salaries.

We’re a global [async remote company](https://www.float.com/blog/giving-our-
team-agency-over-their-time/) with a diverse team of people from all over the
world who share a common belief in living our [best work
life](https://www.float.com/blog/). We believe deeply in the idea of
transparency and share our [Float Handbook](https://www.notion.so/Float-
Handbook-9bf7a6a869744d41b2adfaa1c9131746?pvs=21) publicly so potential new
team members can see first hand our [perks &
benefits](https://www.notion.so/Perks-and-
benefits-1841a06d46528081a119c93f270ec71c?pvs=21) as well as our [ways of
working](https://www.notion.so/Welcome-1ea1a06d465280ca8923fe69cdbc4e0a?pvs=21).
If you feel like you can thrive at Float to do your best work, we would love
to hear from you.

## **Hiring Process For This Role**

You’ll find a lot of useful information about our [interview
process](https://www.notion.so/Hiring-
process-1841a06d4652801f85ebd42caaf5c6e9?pvs=21) and what it’s like to join
our global team on the [Float careers page](https://www.float.com/careers).
The hiring process for this role looks like this:

  * **Application (3 questions)** : We’ll ask you three short questions to understand why this role sparked your interest and learn more about your relevant experience. These questions carry a lot of weight in our process, so take your time to answer them thoughtfully. A few days to reflect and write a strong response beats a rushed, cookie-cutter one every time.
  * **Initial meet (20 min):** You'll meet with Julia, our Talent Manager ( [hi, that’s me](https://www.linkedin.com/in/juliafulton1/)!), to chat about your interest in the role and talk through any questions you have about working at Float.
  * **Manager interview (45 min)** : You’ll meet with Emily, our Director of Customer Success, to learn more about your skills and experience, and hear about how you can make an impact at Float.
  * **Co-worker interview (30 min):** You’ll meet with Alexa, our Senior Content Marketer, to dive deeper into our values at Float, how you work cross-functionally, and learn more about your goals for the role.
  * **Founder Interview (30 min)** : You’ll meet with Glenn, Float’s CEO, to get to know you and see if you have potential to be a great addition to the team.

**Using AI? A Quick Note.**

We know that tools like ChatGPT are part of how many of us work today (us
too!). Feel free to use AI to support your writing, but don’t let it do the
talking for you. We read every application carefully, and it’s easy to spot
when something's been fully copy-pasted. Help us get to know the real you!

_Note: Industry research shows that women and those in traditionally
underrepresented groups generally don’t apply to jobs unless they check all
the boxes for the role. If you feel strongly that you have what it takes for
this role but don’t check 100% of the boxes—that’s okay—we encourage you to
apply anyway and highlight what you can bring to the table._

* * *

postTitle: Technical Customer Support Representative
descContent:
This is a technical role. If you don’t possess basic HTML/CSS/JS skills,
please do not apply.

\------------------------------------------

We are a small team of four people who have been building tools for Shopify
merchants for four years. We’ve been growing steadily and have now reached a
point where we need our second customer support representative.

We take customer support very seriously, as evidenced by our app’s excellent
rating. Now we are ready to take our customer support to an even higher level.

Your main responsibility will be communicating with customers and helping them
solve technical issues. But you will also have the opportunity to try yourself
in other aspects of the business. Initiative is always welcome here. It’s easy
to carve out your own new role if it brings value to the company.

Right now we are in an urgent need of people who understand SEO and can
research and write excellent technical articles. So, this role might be split
50/50 between CS and SEO/writing, making it more interesting.

**Some of the most important duties:**

  * Communicating with customers via live chat or email and resolving any problems they have
  * Continuously learning about the features of our app and the broader Shopify ecosystem to better assist customers
  * Summarizing product feedback from merchants and suggesting new ideas for product improvements
  * Performing manual app tests for new feature releases
  * Handling some non-CS tasks (e.g., researching tools, writing blog posts, creating mockups). These tasks will be assigned based on your natural abilities and interests.

**Must have:**

  * Knowledge of basic HTML/CSS/JS and a willingness to learn more if needed
  * Superb written and verbal communication skills
  * Attention to detail
  * Enjoying talking to people and solving their problems
  * Ability to handle “hard” customers (we have very few of those though 😊)
  * Proficiency in discussing technical concepts at a high level
  * Ability and willingness to write technical documentation/articles
  * Willingness to perform non-CS tasks (we are a small startup and we all wear multiple hats)
  * Willingness to have at least a 4-hour overlap with GMT+7, between 9am–6pm

**Additional things that will make you stand out:**

  1. Deep knowledge of SEO
  2. Your own e-commerce or tech oriented blog
  3. Basic video production skills to produce technical screencasts
  4. UI/UX design skills
  5. Reddit marketing experience

If you have any of the above, please send relevant links in the application.

**Nice to have:**

  * Experience working with Shopify, especially in theme development/customization
  * Experience working with B2B SaaS
  * Additional languages (especially French, Spanish, and Italian)
  * Any other skills useful in a startup (e.g., marketing, SEO, video editing, etc.)

**Salary:**

Negotiable

  

Please mention the word **JUSTLY** when applying to show you read the job post
completely (#RMTc1LjE0MS4xNzMuMzE=). This is a feature to avoid fake spam
applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this
and instantly see they're human.  
  

## Salary and compensation

  
$10,000 — $30,000/year  
  

## Benefits

🌎 Distributed team

⏰ Async

🏖 Paid time off

⬜️ No whiteboard interview

👀 No monitoring system

🚫 No politics at work

🎅 We hire old (and young)

postTitle: LED显示屏外贸英文运营/博客写手
jobTitle: LED显示屏外贸英文运营/博客写手
descContent:
岗位背景： 我们是一家专业的 LED 显示屏供应商，目前正在深耕 B2B 垂直领域的内容营销。我们需要一位英语功底扎实、逻辑清晰的兼职写手，负责公司官网博客（Blog）的内容产出，提升品牌专业度及 SEO 排名。

工作内容：

深度内容创作：根据公司提供的产品资料（如 LED 海报屏、租赁屏、透明屏等）或行业话题，撰写深度英文博客文章。
场景化写作：将技术参数转化为客户价值（例如：不仅写“高刷”，要写“如何在直播中呈现无扫描线的显示效果”）。
SEO 优化：在文中合理布局关键词，编写 Meta Description 及标题，提升搜索友好度。
辅助素材整理：配合文案建议配图位置（您可以结合 AI 提供的初稿进行润色和深度加工）。

任职要求：

语言能力：英语专业八级（TEM-8）或六级（CET-6）高分，具备优秀的英文阅读及地道的书面表达能力，拒绝“中式英语”。
学习能力：能快速理解 LED 显示屏的技术名词（如 Pixel Pitch, Refresh Rate, Nits 等），并能通过外网调研补充行业知识。
经验背景：有外贸文案、海外推广或 B2B 工业品写作经验者优先；熟悉 WordPress/Elementor 操作者优先。
AI 工具使用：（重点） 能够熟练利用 ChatGPT/Gemini 等工具辅助生成初稿，但必须具备极强的人工核查与润色能力，确保内容真实、专业且无事实错误。

试稿说明：我们会提供一个具体产品主题进行 500 字左右的试稿，试稿通过即支付试稿费并开始正式合作。
company: 一家专业的LED显示屏供应商

3.  熟悉 **MySQL / PostgreSQL**，具备数据库设计与性能优化经验

* * *

postTitle: 全栈 / 后端工程师（第三方服务集成 & 增长基础设施）
jobTitle: 全栈 / 后端工程师（第三方服务集成 & 增长基础设施）
descContent:
工作方式：全职｜远程

地点：远程｜薪资：¥10,000–15,000

**我们在做什么**

构建稳定、可维护的第三方服务“中间层”，配合高转化的落地页（LP），确保从点击 → 表单提交 → 服务回传的完整链路稳定、可观测并支持快速回滚与流量切换。

**你将负责**

*   **第三方接口对接**：实现接口调用、鉴权、重试、限流与告警，保证调用稳定可靠、避免请求丢失或重复执行。
*   **从页面与网络请求提取接口**：分析第三方页面的 HTML 与浏览器 Network/HTTP 请求，整理出接口地址、参数、签名/时间戳等要点，并产出可复用的文档或调用示例（如 Postman/OpenAPI/SDK）。
*   **域名与流量切换**：实现灰度/蓝绿、健康检查与自动回滚等机制，支持一键切换与自动容灾。
*   **落地页与实验平台**：搭建可复用的 LP 模板，支持 A/B 测试与服务端埋点方案。
*   **转化数据闭环**：将点击、表单与服务器回传串联，保证数据可追踪、可核对。
*   **工程化与稳定性保障**：推进容器化（Docker）、CI/CD、日志/指标/告警体系，保障稳定上线与运维效率。

**职位要求**

*   **主力后端技术**：熟练掌握一种后端技术栈（Node.js/NestJS/Express、PHP，或 Python/FastAPI/Django）即可。
*   **接口与安全**：熟悉 HTTP/REST、签名/HMAC、Bearer/OAuth2、Webhook 验签等机制。
*   **抗风险能力**：理解并实践幂等、重试与退避策略、限流、熔断与告警。
*   **网关/边缘经验**：有 Nginx/Traefik/Envoy 或 Cloudflare（Workers/Pages/Rules）等任一经验。
*   **基础设施能力**：熟悉 Docker、CI/CD（GitHub Actions/GitLab CI）与常用 Linux 操作。
*   **增长与追踪**：了解服务端埋点、服务器对服务器（S2S）回传、UTM/clickid 与基本 A/B 测试方法。
*   **前端落地页能力**：能使用 React/Next.js 或 Vue 构建落地页，了解基础 SEO 与性能优化（Core Web Vitals）。
*   **可观测性**：能够搭建或维护日志/指标体系（如 Prometheus/Grafana、ELK、或 OpenTelemetry 任一）。
*   **AI 编程辅助工具**：熟悉使用 Copilot/LLM 助手等工具进行样板代码生成、测试与重构；能编写清晰的提示并对 AI 产出做代码审查与合规性校验。

**与“HTML/HTTP 提取 API”相关的能力（必备）**

*   熟练使用 Chrome DevTools（Elements/Network），能导入导出 HAR 文件。
*   能分析 HTTP 请求的 URL、方法、Headers、Cookies、Payload，并使用 cURL/Postman/Insomnia 复现调用。
*   能从页面脚本中定位关键参数（如 token/nonce/timestamp/签名字段），并给出最小可行的调用示例。
*   能将“网页上的操作 → 接口调用”转化为可复用文档或小型 SDK（例如 OpenAPI、TypeScript/Go 封装）。
*   具备对 CORS、CSRF、SameSite Cookie、缓存控制、HTTP/2/3 等常见机制的基础理解。

**加分项**

*   有电信、支付或其他对接要求较高的第三方经验（合规/反滥用/阈值控制）。
*   有域名/流量切换、容灾与自动回滚的实战经验。
*   熟悉限流、WAF、验证码或其他防滥用机制。
*   有把 HAR 转为 OpenAPI、或将 cURL 整理为 Postman 的经验；了解 PDPA/GDPR 等隐私合规要点。

**你将获得**

*   成长机会：与产品、前端与渠道协作，直接面对真实流量与转化挑战。
*   项目提成：成功跑通的项目，可获得纯利润 10%–30% 的提成。

**投递方式**

请将简历与材料发送至：邮箱 【xxxxxx】或添加微信 【xxxxxx】。邮件标题请写：【全栈/后端 - 姓名 - 远程】。

**建议附上（有助于快速通过简历筛选）**

1.  1–2 个相关项目简介（后端接口对接 / LP / 数据追踪闭环 / HTML/HTTP 提取 API），说明你的具体贡献与带来的指标变化（例如“回传成功率从 96% 提升到 99.5%”）。
2.  代码片段或仓库链接（可脱敏），展示幂等、限流、重试、告警或从 HAR/cURL 复现调用的实现。
3.  如有，提供整理好的接口说明或 Postman/OpenAPI 示例（可脱敏）。
jobCategory: 后端开发,全栈开发,DevOps/MLOps,用户增长,运维

postTitle: 前端/ JS 开发工程师
jobTitle: 前端/ JS 开发工程师
descContent:
**工作方式**：全职｜远程

**地点**：远程 ｜ **薪资**：【10000–15000】

**岗位职责**

*   负责 Web 前端功能开发、交互实现与性能优化，确保页面响应与体验达标。
    

*   参与前端架构设计与方案评审，提升页面加载速度与可维护性。
    

*   实现页面核心逻辑：DOM 操作、数据处理、网络请求与状态管理。
    

*   参与复杂业务功能开发，包括异步流程、跨页面/跨窗口数据共享与协作场景处理。
    

*   与后端、产品和测试团队协作，保证项目按期高质量交付。
    

*   维护与重构现有代码，持续提升代码质量与可读性。
    

**任职要求**

**1\. 扎实的 JavaScript 基础**

熟练使用 ES6+ 语法，理解作用域、闭包、原型链、数组与对象常用操作，能独立完成主要业务逻辑实现。

**2\. 熟悉浏览器环境与页面操作**

具备良好 DOM 操作能力（元素查找、增删改、事件处理）、页面导航与本地存储等实践经验。

**3\. 掌握前端异步处理**

能熟练使用 Promise、async/await、fetch 等处理接口调用与异步流程，并能设计错误处理与重试策略。

**4\. 熟悉常见浏览器 API**

对 window、history、localStorage、cookie 等 API 有实际应用经验，能够处理页面间的数据传递与基础交互需求。

**5\. 理解基本的网络与数据处理**

了解 GET/POST、常见响应格式（text/json）、URL 编解码与跨域基础概念（CORS）并能在实际场景中应用。

**6\. 前端安全意识**

具备参数校验与内容过滤实践，了解常见前端安全风险并能采取基本防护措施（如防范脚本注入等）。

**7\. 阅读与维护遗留代码能力**

能阅读并维护包含原生 JS 与 jQuery 的混合代码库，必要时进行结构优化与重构。

**8\. 调试与异常处理能力**

熟练使用浏览器开发者工具，能够定位并解决数据问题、事件冲突及网络异常，保证功能稳定性。

**9\. 良好的工程习惯**

代码结构清晰、命名规范、注释完备；具备协作经验，能在团队内保持代码质量与可维护性。

**投递方式**

请将简历与作品/代码示例发送至：邮箱【xxxxxx】或微信【xxxxxx】。邮件标题请写：**【前端 - 姓名 - 远程】**。

建议附上：相关项目/代码仓库链接或可运行的示例，有助于加快筛选。

加分项

薪酬福利

招聘流程

其他信息

postTitle: Account Executive, Enterprise
descContent:
Hi there!

We’re looking for an experienced **Enterprise Account Executive** to join our
founding Upmarket Sales team.

In this role, you’ll join the Enterprise Sales team and be responsible for
selling Zapier’s Automation platform offerings to customers across the globe.
A successful Account Executive has demonstrated success selling to companies
with employee counts between 1K-5K, can build pipeline through both inbound
and outbound channels, can successfully sell to both executive buyers of
Zapier and technical end users of the product, works collaboratively with
cross functional teams (Product Marketing, Engineering, Demand Generation,
RevOps, etc), and takes ownership for the outcomes of the program.

If you want to advance your career at a fast-growing, profitable, impact-
driven company, read on…

  * [Our Commitment to Applicants](https://zapier.com/jobs/our-commitment-to-applicants/)

  * [Culture and Values at Zapier](https://zapier.com/jobs/culture-and-values-at-zapier/)

  * [Zapier Guide to Remote Work](https://zapier.com/learn/remote-work/)

  * [Zapier Code of Conduct](https://zapier.com/jobs/zapier-code-of-conduct/)

  * [Diversity and Inclusivity at Zapier](https://zapier.com/jobs/working-on-diversity-and-inclusivity/)

## **About You**

  * **You have 5+ years of demonstrated success** in selling horizontal SaaS solutions to multi-stakeholder or technical organizations at the mid-market level, with a strong focus on automation, integrations, and enhancing tech stack efficiency.

  * **Proven track record of success** in closing enterprise-level software deals over $100K and meeting or exceeding your sales quota

  * **Strong understanding of APIs, integrations, and tools like Zapier,** with the ability to explain their importance in modern tech ecosystems.

  * **You're naturally curious about AI** and regularly experiment with different AI tools to drive efficiency in your day-to-day work or personal life.

  * **You’ve used AI tooling for work or personal use** —or you are willing to dive in and learn fast. You explore new tools, workflows, and ideas to make things more efficient, and are eager to deepen your understanding of AI and use it regularly.

postTitle: Senior Product Manager, Plan
descContent:
## **An overview of this role**

You'll lead the Core Planning team within GitLab's Plan stage, reimagining how
development teams organize, coordinate, and plan their work at enterprise
scale. Right now, planning is fragmented—teams juggle issues, epics, and
tickets while struggling to connect their daily work to business outcomes.
You'll solve this by building flexible, configurable planning fundamentals
that replace outdated agile mechanisms with intelligent automation. Your focus
will be on evolving our work item model, integrating agentic AI functionality
that handles repetitive planning tasks, and freeing up teams to focus on what
matters: strategy, intent, and delivery. You'll report to a Group Manager of
Product, working closely with product design and engineering leadership to
define planning for a modern, AI-powered world. In your first year, you'll
reshape the core planning experience that millions of developers across
100,000+ GitLab customers will rely on—transforming how teams think about
planning, not as a burden, but as an intelligent partner in their success.

## **What you’ll do**

  * Lead the Core Planning team's vision and strategy, guiding GitLab's shift from traditional agile planning mechanics toward enterprise-ready planning fundamentals that empower teams to organize, coordinate, and execute work more effectively
  * Own the product strategy for work items—simplifying the fragmented landscape of issues, epics, and tickets into a configurable, unified primitive that scales across organizations of any size
  * Drive the integration of agentic AI functionalities into planning workflows, replacing manual planning tasks with intelligent automation while ensuring trustworthiness and reliability for end users
  * Collaborate cross-functionally with engineering, design, and product teams to understand developer and engineering manager needs, translating them into products that improve team coordination and workflow
  * Define how planning connects to business outcomes, helping teams understand the ROI of their work and make data-driven capacity and cycle-time decisions
  * Co-shape the product's approach to managing context and knowledge, ensuring critical business information and specifications flow seamlessly through the development lifecycle
  * Partner with the Knowledge & Context and Project Management teams within Plan stage to balance responsibilities and eliminate redundancy as the planning experience evolves in the SDLC

## **What you’ll bring**

  * Experience building or shipping products for SaaS, DevOps, or DevSecOps platforms, or working in scale-ups in adjacent spaces
  * Working knowledge of software development and familiarity with how development teams organize and coordinate their work
  * Demonstrated ability to collaborate closely with engineering teams and use data and metrics to inform product decisions
  * Comfort learning quickly in new domains and adapting your approach and decision making based on new information, rather than relying primarily on past patterns
  * Track record of picking things up efficiently and getting productive in new product areas or organizations without extended onboarding periods
  * A mindset that values fresh perspectives and questioning existing approaches, even if you've worked in related spaces before
  * Experience working in distributed or remote environments, or collaborating with teams across different regions and time zones with excellent verbal and written communication skills.

## **About the team**

The Plan stage is reimagining how development teams organize, coordinate, and
execute their work. The Core Planning team you'll lead is at the heart of this
transformation, owning the foundational workflows and mechanics that enable
teams to plan effectively at scale. Working closely with engineering partners
and product designers, your team is responsible for simplifying how work items
(issues, epics, and tickets) are configured and coordinated, while
simultaneously building trustworthy AI-powered agentic functionalities that
free humans from repetitive planning tasks so they can focus on strategy and
intent. You'll be tackling some of the most interesting challenges in DevOps:
moving teams beyond traditional agile estimation guessing games toward real
data-driven capacity planning, connecting business outcomes to actual team
velocity, and scaling planning workflows across organizations with hundreds of
developers. The team operates asynchronously across distributed regions and
collaborates closely with engineering (led by your EM counterpart), design,
and the broader Plan stage initiatives focused on knowledge management and
intelligent automation. This is an opportunity to shape how millions of
developers work together, replacing manual, repetitive planning mechanics with
intelligent systems that amplify human decision-making.

Remote-Global

#### **How GitLab will support you**

  * [Benefits to support your health, finances, and well-being](https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/total-rewards/benefits/general-and-entity-benefits/)
  * [Flexible Paid Time Off](https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/people-group/paid-time-off/)
  * [Team Member Resource Groups](https://about.gitlab.com/company/culture/inclusion/erg-guide/#:~:text=Definition%20of%20the%20TMRG%20%2D%20Team%20Member%20Resource%20Groups,-TMRGs%20are%20voluntary&text=The%20purpose%20for%20this%20type,developing%20the%20sense%20of%20belonging.)
  * [Equity Compensation & Employee Stock Purchase Plan](https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/total-rewards/stock-options/)
  * [Growth and Development Fund](https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/people-group/learning-and-development/growth-and-development/)
  * [Parental leave](https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/total-rewards/benefits/general-and-entity-benefits/#parental-leave)
  * [Home office](https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/finance/expenses/#equipment) support

Please note that we welcome interest from candidates with varying levels of
experience; many successful candidates do not meet every single requirement.
Additionally, studies have shown that people from [underrepresented
groups](https://about.gitlab.com/company/culture/inclusion/#examples-of-
select-underrepresented-groups) are less likely to apply to a job unless they
meet every single qualification. If you're excited about this role, please
apply and allow our recruiters to assess your application.

* * *

**Country Hiring Guidelines:** GitLab hires new team members in countries
around the world. All of our roles are remote, however some roles may carry
specific location-based eligibility requirements. Our Talent Acquisition team
can help answer any questions about location after starting the recruiting

to-our-interview-process).

## **Job Description**

Zapier is hiring a Campaign Marketing Manager to lead scaled outbound powered
by product engagement signals and usage data. This role owns how thousands of
product data points are turned into prioritized, timely outreach that reaches
the right customers when it actually makes sense.

You decide who to reach out to and when outreach is earned. You care about the
craft of outbound and the people on the other side of it. You love the moment
when product insight, timing, and creativity line up and an email is actually
worth sending.

## **About You**

  * 5+ years of B2B marketing experience, with deep focus on Enterprise outbound programs

  * Proven success writing high-performing sales emails at scale

  * You’ve run integrated, complex campaigns across digital, events, partner channels, and you know how to measure impact.

  * Strong understanding of enterprise buying behavior in AI, automation, or transformation

  * Comfortable testing, iterating, and scaling programs across large audiences

  * AI-forward mindset with hands-on experience using AI to improve speed, quality, or relevance

  * Hands-on experience with HubSpot, Gong Engage, and modern outbound engagement platforms.

## **What You’ll Do**

  * Lead campaign planning: Use product usage and intent signals to define outbound priority, timing, and audience selection

  * Write and refine sales-ready outbound messaging aligned to enterprise AI use cases

  * Partner with Product Marketing to translate positioning into outbound-ready narratives

  * Work with RevOps to define targeting, routing, attribution, and performance benchmarks

  * Enable Sales with sequences, messaging frameworks, and activation guidance

  * Measure impact across reply rate, meeting booked rate, pipeline sourced, and conversion

  * Continuously test subject lines, messaging angles, personalization, and formats to improve efficiency

### **About ClickHouse**

Series D financing round. We’re on a mission to transform how companies use
data. Come be a part of our journey!

NOTE: this role can be located anywhere ClickHouse has a hiring presence.

With over 42,000 stars on[ GitHub](https://github.com/ClickHouse), ClickHouse
is the fastest and most resource efficient open-source database for real-time
apps and analytics. Our Core Engineering teams own the heart of our ClickHouse
Open Source project. We are looking for exceptional C++ engineers to join our
remote-first, global team and continue to scale and grow both our open source
and ClickHouse Cloud offerings. More specifically, our Performance Engineering
team is seeking engineers who love optimizing the performance of distributed
systems.

**What will you do?**

  * As part of the ClickHouse Core Performance team, you will analyze and optimize the performance of the core ClickHouse database. The team works on many different topics such as query optimization, distributed query optimization, relational operators (e.g. aggregation and joins), caching, and low-level optimizations like SIMD instructions.
  * You will ensure that the database performance does not deteriorate over time by extending existing and adding new performance tests, based on real-world or synthetic datasets.
  * You will serve as a resource for the Support Engineering team, helping to debug the most advanced performance issues encountered by our customers.
  * As the core ClickHouse database continues to move at a fast pace, you will closely collaborate with our other core teams to assess the impact of new features on performance and support colleagues with performance tests and advice.
  * You will work with our open-source community. This will include resolving issues, reviewing and finishing PRs, answering questions from mail, chats, google groups, external Slack channels, etc.

**About you:**

  * You bring along solid professional software development experience in C++. This includes experience with Unix Systems.
  * You have strong knowledge in database internals and design.
  * You have experience in performance engineering, ideally in a database but other areas like high-frequency trading, simulation, real time data processing etc. are also okay.
  * You communicate well with others and have the ability to work well within and across engineering teams. 
  * You are ready to work closely with our open-source community. You participate in code reviews with patience and attention to detail fostering a culture of collaboration and mutual respect.
  * You are a strong problem-solver and have solid production debugging skills.
  * You are passionate about efficiency, availability, scalability and data governance.
  * You thrive in a fast-paced start-up environment, seeing yourself as a partner with the business with the shared goal of moving forward and building together.
  * You have a high level of responsibility, ownership, and accountability.

**Bonus points for:**

  * Experience with ClickHouse.
  * Experience in security, privacy, and compliance.
  * Experience with TCP/IP and network programming.
  * Experience developing cloud infrastructure services, preferably with Kubernetes.
  * Experience giving public talks at technical conferences and meetups.
  * Previous contributions to open source projects.

#LI-Remote

### **Compensation**

For roles based in the **United States** , the typical starting salary range
for this position is listed above. In certain locations, such as the San
Francisco Bay Area and the New York City Metro Area, a premium market range
may apply, as listed.

These salary ranges reflect what we reasonably and in good faith believe to be

### **Perks**

  * **Flexible work environment** \- ClickHouse is a globally distributed company and remote-friendly. We currently operate in 20 countries.
  * **Healthcare** \- Employer contributions towards your healthcare.
  * **Equity in the company** \- Every new team member who joins our company receives stock options.

**Culture - We All Shape It**

As part of our first 500 employees, you will be instrumental in shaping our
